items.title: Mick Wallace says there is ‘more democracy in Iran than in most other countries’ after accepting award in Tehran
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
items.dek: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.
items.body: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: First Russian shadow fleet tanker enters Channel since Smyrtos boarding
items.dek: Forwarder, a Russian-flagged ship which left port in Primorsk last week, entered the Channel on Wednesday evening.
items.body: Forwarder, a Russian-flagged ship which left port in Primorsk last week, entered the Channel on Wednesday evening.
items.author: IriLine Desk
